p.strong: O(1) Insertion & Deletion for 10K+ Concurrent Timers
p.em: Intel Manual Quality Spec - Implementation Grade

div.p: Resolution: 10.0ms (fixed) Wheel Size: 4096 (Power of 2 for masking) Max Delay: ~40.9s per revolution

ul.li: Memory Alignment: tcp_timer aligned to 32B for dual packing in cache lines.
Tick: $O(1)$ amortized; iterates exactly 1 bucket per 10ms.
Locking: SPSC (Single Producer Single Consumer) queue recommended for thread-safe cross-core timer dispatch.
